news.title: Coffee prices are falling. Expect more losses ahead with bears in control. - MSN
Les prix du café ont augmenté pour la cinquième séance consécutive en raison des conditions météorologiques défavorables au Brésil. - Vietnam.vn
news.summary: Les craintes que des pluies hors saison ne perturbent la récolte et n'augmentent le risque d'épidémies au Brésil ont fait grimper en flèche les prix du café, prolongeant ainsi leur série de hausses pour une cinquième séance consécutive.

news.title: Coffee prices today, June 17: World prices rise sharply - Laodong.vn
news.summary: Today's coffee price on June 17th in the country remained stable around 89,300 VND/kg, while the world Arabica and Robusta prices increased sharply.

news.title: Prix ​​du café aujourd'hui, 17 juin 2026 : La tendance à la hausse se poursuit. - Vietnam.vn
news.summary: Aujourd'hui, 17 juin 2026, les prix du café continuent d'augmenter à l'échelle mondiale.

news.title: Coffee markets soar: New York up 5.2% due to rains in Brazil - Comunicaffe International

Coffee Prices Surge as Rain Delays Brazil Harvest - Barchart.com
news.summary: July arabica coffee (KCN26 ) on Tuesday closed up +14.30 (+5.44%), and July ICE robusta coffee (RMN26 ) closed up +62 (+1.72%).

news.title: Coffee Prices Supported by Brazil Harvest Delays - TradingView
news.summary: July arabica coffee (KCN26) today is up +7.50 (+2.85%), and July ICE robusta coffee (RMN26) is up +49 (+1.36%).Coffee prices have rallied steadily over the past week, with arabica posting a 2-week high and robusta posting a 5-week high.

news.title: Arabica Coffee Futures at Over 2-Week High - TradingView
news.summary: Arabica coffee futures traded slightly above $2.60 per pound, the highest since late May, amid concerns about weather conditions in Brazil's producing regions and the progress of the 2025/26 harvest.
